programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Susie and John met on a dancing holiday in Spain, and are now looking for the perfect holiday home near Estepona. Jean Johansson lines up five properties for their £100,000 budget.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: John and Debbie are dreaming of a two-bedroom home that could one day become their permanent residence on the Costa Cálida in Spain. Lucy Alexander shows them what their money can buy.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Sasha transform their courtyard before back-to-back weddings commence. Anna and Edward spruce up their roof for a wine weekend. Roger and Louisa create a new ensuite.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First aid manager Jacqui plans a hearty menu of pâté, venison, sticky toffee pudding and a bit of banter. But there's sniping and insults between the guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Aspiring actor Daniel puts his twist on a traditional Scottish menu, with spaghetti 'hagginaise' and Irn-Bru ice cream. But feisty Jenna can't hide her dislike of the host.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Basque-born Lorea showcases the food of her homeland. But with tensions still simmering, is it a good idea to get her guests to draw portraits of each other.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jenna plans a night of perfection, but her decision to cover her floor in plastic confuses her guests, and there's yet more drama between her and Daniel.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: New Zealand-born Craig hopes that his lobster and wild boar will blow his rivals out of the water. But the brewing tension threatens to boil over.

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Edinburgh locals perform the one song that tells their story - from the tune a 22-year-old played at his mum's funeral to the Zach Bryan track that helped an ex-soldier with his PTSD.

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: In Switzerland, Paul travels up front on the stunning Glacier Express and drives a funicular train to the Reichenbach Falls, where Sherlock Holmes met his fictional demise.

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Ruby-Rose is ready to level up from dog sitting to a dog of her own. Could a cheeky Yorkie be the one? And will ex-cabbie Danny give Bella the Border collie a lift.

programme.desc: The drone police join the search for a woman who left a suicide note and vanished. Officers track a dodgy dog-breeding gang to a horrific hovel. And a wrongdoer's hiding up a tree.

programme.desc: Eva Green and Asa Butterfield star in Tim Burton's fantasy adventure. A teenager enters the magical, but scary and violent, world where his grandfather grew up.
